name: Nepal Grand Tour
overview: Explore the best of Kathmandu, Pokhara, Chitwan, Lumbini with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at TIA airport Kathmandu, Received and transfer to Hotel, short briefing
itinerary.description: Arrival at TIA airport Kathmandu, Received and transfer to Hotel, short briefing about the program, O/N at Hotel.

itinerary.title: A full day guided sightseeing tour in Kathmandu, including Durbar Square, Swyamb
itinerary.description: A full day guided sightseeing tour in Kathmandu, including Durbar Square, Swyambhu Nath, Bouddha Nath and Pashupati Nath, O/N at Hotel.

itinerary.title: Half day guided sightseeing tour to fine art city of Patan and surrounding area,
itinerary.description: Half day guided sightseeing tour to fine art city of Patan and surrounding area, O/N at Hotel.

itinerary.title: Early morning drive to Chitwan Safari park by tourist coach, arrival transfer to
itinerary.description: Early morning drive to Chitwan Safari park by tourist coach, arrival transfer to Resort, and Tharu village walk, O/N at Resort.

itinerary.title: Full day Jungle activities in and out side of the national park like, Elephant b
itinerary.description: Full day Jungle activities in and out side of the national park like, Elephant back safari, canoeing, visit elephant breeding center with a nature guide and Tharu cultural show in the evening, O/N Resort.

itinerary.title: Wake up breakfast and drive to next panoramic destination Pokhara, arrival and t
itinerary.description: Wake up breakfast and drive to next panoramic destination Pokhara, arrival and transfer to Hotel, rest of the time free personal activities, O/N at Hotel.

itinerary.title: AM: transfer to Sarangkot a hilltop station best for Annapurna range of Himalaya
itinerary.description:
AM: transfer to Sarangkot a hilltop station best for Annapurna range of Himalayan view and Sunrise.
                    PM: visit Bindya Bashini temple and Mahendra cave O/N Hotel.

itinerary.title: Half day trip to David fall and Peace stupa and boating on Phewa Lake, O/N at Ho
itinerary.description: Half day trip to David fall and Peace stupa and boating on Phewa Lake, O/N at Hotel.

itinerary.title: Early morning drive back to Kathmandu, arrival and transfer to Hotel, rest of ti
itinerary.description: Early morning drive back to Kathmandu, arrival and transfer to Hotel, rest of time free for shopping, traditional Nepali dinner with cultural show in the evening, O/N Hotel.

itinerary.title: Everest Mountain flight (optional) in the morning, transfer to Airport for your
itinerary.description:
Everest Mountain flight (optional) in the morning, transfer to Airport for your final departure or join our next program.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic

seo.title: Nepal Grand Tour | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book Nepal Grand Tour with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Kathmandu, Pokhara, Chitwan, Lumbini tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
